channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin supply in profit heads to ‘true bear market’ levels
item.description: Cryptoquant data shows there are 8.2 million Bitcoin currently at a loss, which is still under the amount of Bitcoin at a loss during the 2022 bear market.

item.title: Bitcoin heads into holiday weekend exposed as ETF and CME flows go offline
item.description: Good Friday shuts CME futures and ETF activity, removing a key source of demand as large holders continue distributing and spot demand weakens.

item.title: Tokenization makes finance more efficient but introduces risks: IMF
item.description: The IMF said tokenization could improve cross-border payments and financial inclusion in emerging economies but cited concerns over volatility and the “erosion of monetary sovereignty.”

item.title: Stablecoins flip automated clearing house volume in February
item.description: Stablecoin monthly transaction volume hit $7.2 trillion in February, surpassing the $6.8 trillion processed by the Automated Clearing House network.

item.title: Circle to launch cirBTC wrapped Bitcoin, challenging BitGo and Coinbase
item.description: Circle, known for issuing stablecoins including USDC and EURC, is expanding into the Bitcoin space, targeting institutional users.

item.title: Bitcoin miner Riot sold 3,778 BTC during Q1 amid broader market pressure
item.description: Arkham also flagged a 500 Bitcoin outflow from Riot on Thursday, while MARA Holdings, Genius Group and Nakamoto Holdings sold a combined 15,501 Bitcoin in the last week.

item.title: Big Tech firms back new x402 Foundation to advance agentic AI adoption
item.description: The x402 protocol won't be owned by a single entity, with the Linux Foundation serving as the agentic AI protocol’s “neutral, non-profit home,” Coinbase said.

item.title: Todd Blanche, author of DOJ crypto enforcement memo, is now interim AG
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump named Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney and deputy attorney general, as the interim top prosecutor.

item.title: Naoris Launches Post-Quantum Blockchain as Bitcoin, Ethereum Devs Scramble to Face Threat
item.description: Naoris Protocol says its blockchain network uses quantum-resistant cryptography, as the wider crypto industry prepares for future threats.

item.title: New Bitcoin price lows on the table until $76K becomes support
item.description: Bitcoin data shows a series of bearish trading patterns that could usher in new price lows if the key support at $60,000 fails to hold. Here’s why bulls need a rally to $76,000.

item.title: Crypto market structure bill release pushed back as industries view revised stablecoin yield compromise this week
item.description: Crypto and banking industry representatives are viewing revised stablecoin yield compromise language this week.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Stablecoin supply reaches $315B in Q1 as USDC rises, USDT declines
item.description: Stablecoins dominated crypto trading in Q1 as investors sought safety, while rising bot usage and declining retail flows pointed to shifting market dynamics, according to CEX.io.

item.title: Rocky US economy, private credit stress, war, impact Bitcoin’s odds for $75K rally
item.description: Are Bitcoin’s odds for a rally to $75,000 diminished by a weakening US economy, the war in Iran and multiple institutional BTC holders selling in the open market?

item.title: USDC Stablecoin Issuer Circle Unveils New Token to Give Bitcoin More Utility
item.description: Publicly traded stablecoin issuer Circle is launching a new token, cirBTC, its own wrapped Bitcoin alternative.

item.title: Google Researchers Reveal Every Way Hackers Can Trap, Hijack AI Agents
item.description: A Google DeepMind paper maps six attack categories against autonomous AI agents—from invisible HTML commands to multi-agent flash crashes.

item.title: Polymarket expands into equities and commodities with Pyth price feeds
item.description: The prediction market is introducing price-based contracts tied to stocks and commodities, using Pyth data feeds as the "resolution source" to automatically settle outcomes.

item.title: CFTC sues 3 states over prediction market regulatory authority
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission claims it "first officially recognized" event contracts in 1992 and that Congress has granted it sole authority over the market.

item.title: X mulls new rules for first-time crypto posts amid tortoise scam
item.description: An executive said the social media platform could lock accounts mentioning crypto for the first time and require verification after a scammer faked reports of a tortoise's death.

item.title: Elon Musk's X Is Making Big Changes to Combat Crypto Scams
item.description: Will Elon Musk's X finally zap crypto scams? Here's why one exec says the changes "should kill 99% of the incentive."

item.title: Drift Protocol's $285 Million Exploit on Solana Raises Questions Over DeFi Security
item.description: A blockchain security expert compared Drift’s lapse in security to Ethereum network Ronin's $625 million loss in 2022.

item.title: Here’s why bitcoin’s drop below $68,000 raises the risk of a crash under $60,000
item.description: The negative gamma zone below $68,000 can trigger a self-reinforcing sell-off, leading to an ever larger slump.

item.title: Ether at risk of new 2026 lows if bulls fail to turn $2.4K into support
item.description: Fresh lows below $1,736 could be in store for Ether price if bulls fail to hold the altcoin’s price above an important ascending trendline.

item.title: Chainalysis Links NYC 2026: AI Amplification, TradFi Convergence, and the Power of Networked Intelligence
item.description: Chainalysis Links 2026 brought together the brightest minds across cryptocurrency exchanges, global law enforcement, and traditional finance (TradFi) for an… The post Chainalysis Links NYC 2026: AI Amplification, TradFi Convergence, and th…

item.title: Google Jumps Back Into the Open Source AI Race With Gemma 4
item.description: Google drops Gemma 4, a family of open models under the Apache 2.0 license, just as the U.S. open-source scene badly needed a win.

item.title: Coinbase Links Up With Linux Foundation to Launch x402 Foundation
item.description: The new group will steward an open standard for embedding payments into web interactions.

item.title: Trump Admin Backs Prediction Markets With Lawsuits Against Illinois, Arizona and Connecticut
item.description: The lawsuits, jointly filed by the Justice Department and the CFTC, mark the most forceful move yet by the Trump administration to free prediction markets from state gambling regulations.

item.title: AI Could Become 2,000 Times More Efficient by Copying the Brain: Study
item.description: Researchers from Loughborough University are looking into a new type of computer chip that could make AI far more energy efficient.

item.title: SoFi expands into institutional finance with integrated crypto services
item.description: The new platform enables companies to hold funds, move money and settle transactions in fiat or crypto within a single regulated system.

item.title: Bitcoin miner Soluna acquires $53M wind farm to power AI facility
item.description: Soluna expanded into artificial intelligence in 2024 to shore up declining revenues from its crypto mining business, mirroring an industry-wide shift toward AI workloads.

item.title: Quantum-Powered Crypto Mining Is Here—But It Won't Help You Mine Bitcoin
item.description: Quip Network's creators say it's optimized for mining by quantum computers—a positive, unlike the looming quantum threat to Bitcoin.

item.title: CFTC sues Illinois, Arizona, Connecticut over states' sports prediction market efforts
item.description: The CFTC argued in a lawsuit that the Commodity Exchange Act gave it "exclusive jurisdiction" over all swaps, which include prediction markets.

item.title: Coinbase Gets Conditional Approval From Banking Regulator—But Isn't Launching a Bank
item.description: Coinbase said Thursday that it is the latest crypto firm to secure a conditional bank charter from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency.

item.title: Coinbase wins initial bank regulator nod for trust charter, boosting custody push
item.description: Coinbase’s conditional OCC approval moves it closer to operating as a federally regulated crypto custodian, pending compliance and final review.

item.title: Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Details His 'Private' and 'Secure' AI Setup
item.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin detailed his local-first AI stack in a new blog post, including custom tools that rely on human approval.

item.title: Coinbase receives conditional approval for US trust charter
item.description: Chief legal officer Paul Grewal announced the approval on Thursday, thanking OCC head Jonathan Gould, who took office less than a year ago.

item.title: Circle Wrapped Bitcoin is coming. Backed 1:1 by BTC and readily verifiable onchain, cirBTC is being built to work seamlessly with Circle infrastructure and the broader DeFi ecosystem. Learn more: circle.com/cirbtc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFB6d3I4Y1RXR0RtMExMbnNpQnozVno5dFZVOUtkS2JoOVNGMUg5VFhaRm9JNExiV1FhQXJOSmFwTG4xYVUyZklSTXVpY1Qza1RYMG1ILXFveXNhanM?oc=5" target="_blank">Circle Wrapped Bitcoin is coming. Backed 1:…

item.title: Solana Meme Coin Linked to Death Hoax for 194-Year-Old Tortoise—Who Is Very Much Alive
item.description: Jonathan, a nearly 200-year-old tortoise, was widely mourned Wednesday—but his purported demise was a hoax, and there's a crypto connection.

item.title: Bitcoin holders face $600B in unrealized losses as BTC price slips to $66K
item.description: About 44% of Bitcoin's circulating supply trades underwater at $66,000 with weak spot demand weighing on market sentiment.

item.title: Elon Musk's X to deploy scam kill switch by auto-locking first-time crypto mentioners
item.description: The move comes in response to a wave of phishing attacks using fake copyright emails and is the latest in an attempt to shut down crypto-linked scams on the platform.

item.title: JUST IN: Crypto and banking industry representatives to review a revised stablecoin proposal today to advance the Bitcoin and crypto market structure bill, Politico reports. 🇺🇸 Odds of this bill being signed into law spike to 67%, according to Polymarket 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBmOEFTR1BpbkluNjhfVk9sbFNYajJmQWlvQzJtb2Nla3VBNndpb3FyS0lXSl81bk9Db2tsRWlkQnZjV0laOWUzQWl2R040azA4aVdnRl8yaUtldFpqdk5UNDgza1VUYWc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Crypto and banking…

item.title: How a Solana feature designed for convenience let attackers drain more than $270 million from Drift
item.description: The exploit did not involve a bug in Drift's code. It used "durable nonces," a legitimate Solana transaction feature, to pre-sign administrative transfers weeks before executing them, bypassing the protocol's multisig security in minutes.

item.title: Bitcoin trims big loss, stocks erase 2% decline, as Iran signals cooperation on key shipping route
item.description: In the middle of a surge higher following President Trump's overnight comments, the price of WTI crude oil quickly fell nearly $6 per barrel on the news.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto custody’s evolution
item.description: Beyond simple storage, the next era of institutional crypto will be defined by the real-time connectivity and mobility of digital assets across a fragmented market.

item.title: DeFi is optimizing for gas, not for markets
item.description: DeFi prioritizes gas efficiency over market resilience. Simplified financial logic fails under volatility due to computational constraints.

item.title: CFTC Settles With Former FTX Engineer for $3.7M, Closing First Individual Case
item.description: He built systems that moved billions in customer funds. Now, the CFTC has closed his case with no civil penalty, citing his cooperation.

item.title: North Koreans hackers likely behind $286 million Drift Protocol exploit: Elliptic
item.description: The blockchain analytics firm pointed to cross-chain laundering patterns and Solana-specific tracing challenges that mirror prior North Korean state-linked operations.

item.title: Bitcoin hits weekly low on oil fears as analyst teases $10K BTC price target
item.description: Analysis warned that Bitcoin risked falling to $10,000 in the long term as BTC price action fell with US stocks amid oil-supply concerns.

item.title: US Attorney's Office Recovers $600K in Crypto Fraud Scheme Targeting Ledger Wallet Owners
item.description: Federal prosecutors in Connecticut seized over $600,000 in crypto linked to a fraud case that hit at least one Ledger hardware wallet user.

item.title: Oil shock, Iran war risk keep crypto investors on sidelines: Grayscale
item.description: The crypto asset manager said investors are sidelined by Middle East tensions, but resilient valuations and structural adoption trends could set up the next leg higher.

item.title: The 'time pain' trap: why bitcoin’s bear market might need a few more months of ‘boring’ to hit a true floor
item.description: Long term holder trends suggest a maturing bear market, yet extended consolidation could test investor patience.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 4.5% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Uniswap (UNI) declined 7.7% and Solana (SOL) dropped 6.9%, leading the index lower.

item.title: Made Strategic Investment with leading global digital asset trading firm, backing Predict.fun as the world’s most capital-efficient, DeFi-enabled prediction marketKey takeaways:YZi Labs announced a strategic follow-on investment in Predict.fun following EASY - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFA1VGNNVWRtVTI3RkxaZUNmUldOMDlIblVyYUF4Z2RrUzFkZFdPZVVWT1Q4eWhiZEZvbWpWS3dpcklpWGUtOWtMdDNnM05NTFlud2g2SzlOUWt4Y2Rr?oc=5" target="_blank">Made Strategic Investment with leading glo…

item.title: Coinbase’s AI payments system joins Linux Foundation, gathers support from Google, Stripe, AWS and others
item.description: The Coinbase-engineered agentic commerce protocol x402 has garnered support from a long list of big names like Google, Cloudflare and Stripe.

item.title: Metaplanet Adds 5,075 BTC in Q1, Becomes Third Largest Bitcoin Treasury
item.description: The Tokyo-listed firm is now the third-largest Bitcoin treasury company—though that's partly down to MARA Holdings' recent sale of 15,000 BTC.

item.title: Startup lets researchers mine blockchain tasks on a quantum computer for the first time
item.description: Built with advice and hardware access from D-Wave, the testnet has drawn 13,000 sign-ups and early work from six research teams, but remains an experimental environment rather than a live mainnet.

item.title: SoFi announces 24/7 banking hub that blends traditional cash with crypto
item.description: The new service lets companies hold dollars, convert to stablecoins and move money instantly within a regulated bank.

item.title: Europe's first blockchain IPO is here: France’s new exchange is taking aerospace firm public onchain
item.description: The move positions Lise and ST Group as an early test case for going public directly on blockchain rails within EU rules.

item.title: 🚨 THIS IS THE BIGGEST STORY RIGHT NOW And very few people are paying attention to it. It's not the US-Iran war. It's not the Gulf states considering new pipelines to avoid the Strait. It's "Iran threatening the Petrodollar status." Iran is now asking for ships to p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB2RVQ4VmhPUXJVSnRIXzNRZU10am8xWHhObGRNY25BN0EyT0cyTlZfZ0c0TVdoMUl2ZllNOUlYSG1HUlBac3ctZ2hjMXU0QmZFUUhpYTBPcXVMcDFWN0lkRUtR?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 THIS IS THE BIGGEST STORY RIGHT…

item.title: Coinbase CLO: Clarity Act Deal on Stablecoin Yield 'Very Close'
item.description: The crypto exchange's top lawyer dismissed banking industry concerns about deposit flight as lawmakers work to finalize stablecoin provisions.
